features.description: Dependencies added and BackupSummary derives Serialize

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'axum' Cargo.toml && grep -c 'tower-http' Cargo.toml && grep -c 'base64' Cargo.toml && grep -c 'axum-server' Cargo.toml && grep -c 'Serialize' src/list.rs
layers.fail_message: Missing dependency or BackupSummary Serialize derive

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | tail -1

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_backup_summary_serializable -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: Dependency addition and derive change -- no runtime binary behavior

alternative_verification.command: cargo test test_backup_summary_serializable -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep 'test result: ok'

features.description: ActionLog ring buffer with start/finish/fail/kill lifecycle

features.description: Backup operation endpoints: create, upload, download, restore, create_remote, restore_remote

features.description: Integration tables (CREATE/DROP URL engine tables in ClickHouse)

layers.name: structural
layers.command: grep -c 'fn create_integration_tables' src/clickhouse/client.rs && grep -c 'fn drop_integration_tables' src/clickhouse/client.rs
layers.fail_message: Integration table methods not defined on ChClient

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: cargo check 2>&1 | tail -1
layers.fail_message: Compilation errors in integration table methods

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: cargo test test_integration_table_ddl_generation -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep -c 'test result: ok'
layers.fail_message: Integration table DDL generation test failed

layers.name: runtime
layers.justification: DDL execution requires real ClickHouse; DDL string correctness verified in behavioral layer

alternative_verification.command: cargo test test_integration_table_ddl_generation -- --nocapture 2>&1 | grep 'test result: ok'

features.description: Command::Server wired to start_server() in main.rs, pub mod server in lib.rs

layers.fail_message: pub mod server or start_server wiring missing

features.description: CLAUDE.md created for src/server, updated for src/clickhouse

layers.name: structural
layers.command: test -f src/server/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/clickhouse/CLAUDE.md && echo PASS
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing

layers.name: compilation
layers.command: echo 'N/A - documentation only'

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: grep -q 'Parent Context' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Directory Structure' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Key Patterns' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Parent Rules' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'create_integration_tables' src/clickhouse/CLAUDE.md && echo VALID
layers.fail_message: CLAUDE.md missing required sections or integration tables documentation
